abilities.name: Improved Malefic Arrow
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Malefic Arrow by -2 sec.

abilities.name: Hastened
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of all Wards, Idols, and Effigies by -25%.

abilities.name: Reclamation
abilities.desc: Shoot a quick voodoo arrow at an enemy dealing 100% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 15 as Nature damage and collecting a Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.Usable while moving.

abilities.name: Eye of Kimbul
abilities.desc: Critical strikes now apply Eye of Kimbul to enemies for 15 seconds.Eye of KimbulIncreases damage dealt and critical strike chance against this target by 1%, stacking 5 times.While affected, enemies cannot stealth or turn invisible.

abilities.name: Presence of the Loa
abilities.desc: Increases your critical strike chance by 4%.

abilities.name: Cursed Effigy
abilities.desc: Drop a Cursed Effigy near you for 15 seconds.Enemies within 15 yds are unable to critically strike.

abilities.name: Voodoo Hunger
abilities.desc: While Shadowstalker or Mirage is active, every 1 sec you now gain a stack of Voodoo Hunger.Voodoo HungerIncreases the damage of your next Malefic Arrow by 10%, stacking 10 times. Lasts 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Dark Loa's Blessing
abilities.desc: Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, your Shadow Puppets now deals damage -20% faster.

abilities.name: Voodoo Spirits
abilities.desc: Hexfire now snaps your Puppeteer's Threads on your target, unleashing its damage on them instantly and collecting one Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

abilities.name: Beware Da Voodoo
abilities.desc: Increases the duration of Mimic Ward and Spirits by 4 sec.

abilities.name: Mojo: Jungle Thistle
abilities.desc: Your Potion Toss and Splash Potion cooldown is reset, and the next use within 5 seconds now applies Jungle Thistle to affected allies.Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Jungle Shrooms and Bloodthistle.

abilities.name: Mojo High
abilities.desc: Your Mimic Ward now summons 1 additional Mimic Ward and its duration is increased by 3 sec.

abilities.name: Shadow Enchantments
abilities.desc: Increases the duration and effectiveness of your Jinxes by 25%.

abilities.name: Sen'jin's Presence
abilities.desc: Casting Potion Toss and Spirit in a Bottle now reduce the cast time of your next 2 Loa's Brews by -20% for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Mojo: Fish Bones
abilities.desc: Your Potion Toss and Splash Potion cooldown is reset, and the next use within 5 seconds now applies Fish Bones to affected allies.Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Fish Oil and Frog Bones.

abilities.name: Mojo: Frog Shrooms
abilities.desc: Your Potion Toss and Splash Potion cooldown is reset, and the next use within 5 seconds now applies Frog Shrooms to affected allies.Instantly swaps your Ingredients to Jungle Shrooms and Frog Bones.

abilities.name: Ingredient: Bloodthistle
abilities.desc: Brew Bloodthistle into your Cauldron.Cauldron: Allies within 40 yds receive 8% increased healing.Potion: Causes target ally to leech 5% of all damage they deal for 15 seconds. Can only occur once every 0.5 sec.

abilities.name: Splash On 'Em
abilities.desc: Effective healing done by Loa's Brew and Mojo Beam reduce the cooldown of Potion Toss and Splash Potion by -1 sec.

abilities.name: Disciple of Sseratus
abilities.desc: Increases the bonus healing scaling of Loa's Brew and Spirit in a Bottle by 15%.

abilities.name: Master of Concoctions
abilities.desc: Increases the duration of Ingredients by 20% and causes allies affected by Jungle Shrooms to heal for 5% of the damage they deal with their next 3 offensive abilities or spells for 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Unstable Concoction
abilities.desc: Potion Toss now applies Unstable Concoction to the target for 20 seconds. Using Loa's Brew or Spirit in a Bottle on the target will trigger an explosion of mojo around the target, healing nearby allies within 20 yds for 177 + 40% healing.

abilities.name: Chosen One
abilities.desc: Your Mimic Ward will now summon 1 additional ward.

abilities.name: Amphibimorph
abilities.desc: Transform enemies at target location into a frog, making them unable to attack or cast spells, and slowing their movement speed by -25% for 40 seconds (8 sec vs players). While transformed into a frog the enemy is considered a Beast.Damage caused may interrupt the effect.

abilities.name: Vol'jin's Vigil
abilities.desc: Embrace the way of Vol'jin, reducing your damage taken by -25% and healing you for 2% of your maximum health every 1 sec for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Mojo Madness
abilities.desc: Damage and healing done now have a 5% chance to reduce the cost of your next spell or ability by -100% for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Jin'do's Wrath
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Hexfire by 25%.

abilities.name: Wizened
abilities.desc: Increases your maximum mana by 5% and reduces the mana cost of spells and abilities by -3%.

abilities.name: For Da Loa!
abilities.desc: Transforms Allcure Elixir into Mass Allcure Elixir.Mass Allcure ElixirRemoves all poison, disease and curse effects from party and raid members within 30 yds, and grants immunity to such effects for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: One Armed Waltz
abilities.desc: Big Bad Voodoo now only reduces damage dealt by 25% and reduces damage taken by an additional -5%.

abilities.name: Swift Idol
abilities.desc: Drop a Swift Idol near you for 10 seconds.Allies within 30 yds gain 25% increased movement speed and their chance to resist movement impairing effects is increased by 25%.

abilities.name: Loa Communion
abilities.desc: Increases the damage dealt by Veil of Darkness by 100%.

abilities.name: Voodoo Unleashed
abilities.desc: Your Mimic Wards now also cast Bad Juju and casting Bad Juju now reduces the cooldown of Shadow Puppets by -3 sec.

abilities.name: Spiritual Traditions
abilities.desc: Allows 40% of your mana regeneration to continue while casting and reduces your spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 70%.

abilities.name: Soul Marionette
abilities.desc: Root yourself for 8 sec and create 5 clones of yourself that channel on you, applying a stack of Soul Marionette.Soul Marionette (Stacks)Increases your haste by 1% per stack. At 20 stacks, you transform into a powerful spirit, increasing the damage of Malefic Wrath and Bad Juju by 30% and guaranteeing it to critically strike for 15 seconds.In addition, each Soul Marionette will explode, dealing 582 + 50% shadow SP Shadow Damage and stunning enemies within 5 yds for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: The Price of Power
abilities.desc: Voice of Bwonsamdi now increases your Spirit by 100%.

abilities.name: Dark Magic
abilities.desc: Reduces the cast time of Malefic Wrath and Bad Juju by -0.3 sec.

abilities.name: Voodoo Mind
abilities.desc: Shadow Puppets now ticks -10% faster and lasts 10% longer for each Spirit active on you.

abilities.name: Ritual Hexing
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Bad Juju, Malefic Wrath and Hexfire by 10% against enemies affected by Hex of Malice.

abilities.name: Vol'jin's Blessing
abilities.desc: While Shadow Avatar is active, the cooldown of Spirit Glaive is now reduced by 20% every 1 sec.

abilities.name: Residual Energy
abilities.desc: At the end of Shadow Avatar's duration you become a Lesser Shadow Avatar.Lesser Shadow AvatarIncreases magic damage dealt by 10% and reduces the cooldown of Spirit Glaive by 20% every 1 sec. Lasts for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Spiritual Devotee
abilities.desc: Collecting a Spirit now instantly restores 3% of your maximum mana.

abilities.name: Dark Loa's Incantation
abilities.desc: Dealing damage with Shadowflare now applies Hex of Malice if it strikes at least 3 enemies.Hex of MaliceCurse an enemy, dealing 5 + 8% shadow SP + 10% ranged AP Shadow damage and an additional 96 Shadow damage over 24 seconds.

abilities.name: Village Wisdom
abilities.desc: Increases your hit chance by 5% and the damage of Reclamation by 15%.

abilities.name: A Price To Pay
abilities.desc: Casting Spirit Eclipse with 5 Spirits now resets the cooldown of Spirit Glaive and causes your next cast within 8 seconds to be guaranteed to critically strike.Spirit Glaives used in this way will reduce the cooldown of Shadowstalker by -15 sec.

abilities.name: Loa Empowerment
abilities.desc: Reduces the cost of your Wujus by -50% and increases the effectiveness of Power Wuju by 20%.

abilities.name: Fool's Play
abilities.desc: Target an enemy and summon a copy of them for 20 seconds that attacks them and replicates their spells back on them.

abilities.name: Fresh Ingredients
abilities.desc: Increases the healing of your Jungle Shrooms from your Cauldron by 15%.

abilities.name: Malignant
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Bad Juju and Hexfire now spreads Hex of Malice to up to 1 nearby enemy.

abilities.name: Mixologist
abilities.desc: You can now add an additional Ingredient to your Cauldron, enhancing your brew.Teaches you Ingredient: Fish Oil.Ingredient: Fish OilBrew Fish Oil into your Cauldron.Cauldron: Increases the movement speed and swim speed of allies within 40 yds by 10%.Potion: Increases the target ally's movement speed by 20% and dodge chance by 5% for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Voodoo Fire
abilities.desc: Your Serpent Ward's attacks now have a 20% chance to shoot Voodoo Fire, dealing cond(gt(SPFI, SPN), 73*1+ranged AP*0.03+SPFI*0.12, 73*1+ranged AP*0.03+SPN*0.12) Fire damage to up to 3 nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Darkspear Traditionalist
abilities.desc: Emanate a powerful aura, granting 10% increased melee and ranged haste to party and raid members. Does not stack with similar effects.Periodic damage dealt by Hex of Malice now has a 20% chance to collect a Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

abilities.name: Spirit Warden
abilities.desc: Summoning an Idol now increases your Spirit by 10% for 1 minute.

abilities.name: Spirit Eclipse
abilities.desc: Unleash your Spirits on an enemy, dealing 8 + 7% ranged AP + 12% shadow SP Shadow damage every 0 sec for each active Spirit.Each Spirit explodes on impact, dealing 71 + 6% shadow SP + 3.5% ranged AP Shadow damage to other nearby enemies within 5 yds of the target.

abilities.name: Juju Injection
abilities.desc: Increases your Agility and Intellect by 5%.

abilities.name: Seeker
abilities.desc: Reduces the mana cost of your Wards, Idols, and Effigies by -20%.

abilities.name: Dark Effigy
abilities.desc: Your Bad Juju and Hexfire now strike 2 additional nearby enemies.Shadowflare now deals 50% increased damage to enemies affected by Puppeteer's Threads.Puppeteer’s Threads (Debuff)Damage taken from the Witch Doctor stores 10% of its value. When the effect ends the damage stored is dealt instantly.

abilities.name: Shadowstalker
abilities.desc: Disappear into darkness, entering an improved stealth mode, clearing all harmful effects, and increasing movement speed by 50% for 20 seconds.

abilities.name: Splash Potion
abilities.desc: Fill a splash potion from your Cauldron, and toss it at a location, healing up to 8 allies for 54 + 22.45% healing + 8% Spirit.Potion effects from Ingredients used this way have reduced effectiveness.

abilities.name: Plentiful Potions
abilities.desc: Reduces the cost of your Loa's Brew and Hexbreak by -10%.

abilities.name: Potent Mixes
abilities.desc: Increases your healing done by 4% and reduces the threat generated by your spells by -15%.

abilities.name: Tiki Splash
abilities.desc: While a Base is active, Spirit in a Bottle will now transform into Tiki Splash.Tiki SplashSplash target location with healing waters, healing for 34 + 25% SP every 1 sec for 5 seconds. Gains a new effect based on your currently active Base. Scales with modifiers to Spirit in a Bottle.Beast Blood: Grants you 5% increased critical strike chance for 15 seconds, stacking 2 times.Crystal Water: Grants you a shield that absorbs 422 + 75% SP Magic damage for 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Hexfire
abilities.desc: Blast an enemy with hexfire, dealing cond(gt(SPFI, SPN), 60+0+SPFI*0.55, 60+0+SPN*0.55+SPI*0.5) Fire damage, scaling with your Spirit.

abilities.name: Frenzied Spirits
abilities.desc: Consumes your Spirits to increase your ranged critical strike rating by 10, critical damage by 5%, and causing you to heal for 2% of all damage dealt for each Spirit consumed.In addition, you gain 1 Spirit every 1 sec while active.Lasts for 3 sec per Spirit consumed.

abilities.name: Loa's Strength
abilities.desc: Increases your Agility and your Nature and Shadow damage dealt by 3%.

abilities.name: Bwonsamdi's Gift
abilities.desc: While Mimic Ward is active, you now gain 15% increased ranged haste and your Reclamation transforms into Spirit Volley. Each Spirit now increases the damage of Spirit Volley by 3%.In addition, direct ranged abilty damage dealt now reduces the cooldown of Mimic Ward by -0.5 sec.

abilities.name: Spirit Glaive
abilities.desc: Toss spectral glaives that strikes enemies it passes through, dealing 66 + 50% ranged AP + 50% shadow SP Shadow damage, and reducing their Shadow Resistance by 61 for 5 seconds.Usable while moving. Cast time scales with your Agility.

abilities.name: Spirit Walker
abilities.desc: Increases the duration and effectiveness of Vol'jin's Vigil and Swift Idol by 10%.

abilities.name: Malefic Arrow
abilities.desc: Transforms your Malefic Wrath into Malefic Arrow.Malefic ArrowLaunch a voodoo arrow at an enemy, dealing 85% Ranged Weapon Damage plus 25 + 20% ranged AP + 25% nature SP as Nature damage, healing you equal to 40% of the damage dealt.

abilities.name: Ingredient: Jungle Shrooms
abilities.desc: Brew Jungle Shrooms into your Cauldron.Cauldron: Heal up to 8 allies within 30 yds for 34 + 15% healing every 8 sec.Potion Toss: Heal the target ally for -3.75 to -2.75 every 3 sec for 18 seconds.

abilities.name: Potion Toss
abilities.desc: Fill a potion from your Cauldron, and toss it at a friendly target, healing them for 108 + 40% healing + 10% Spirit.The effect of Potion Toss will change based on your active Ingredients.

abilities.name: Malignant Jinx
abilities.desc: Curse an enemy for 8 seconds, causing their next spell cast to silence them for 5 sec.Can only have 1 Jinx active on a target at a time.

abilities.name: Mimic Ward
abilities.desc: Summon a mimic ward for 12 seconds. For the duration when you cast Malefic Wrath and Loa's Brew the ward will also cast it on your target.

abilities.name: Potion Boss
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of Potion Toss and your tossed Ingredients by 20%.

abilities.name: Slither
abilities.desc: Transform into a serpent, removing all movement impairing effects and increasing movement speed by 80% for 5 seconds.You cannot attack or cast spells, but chance to be hit by ranged attacks and spells is reduced by -100% for the duration.

abilities.name: Cleansing Idol
abilities.desc: Drop a Cleansing Idol near you for 1 minute.Allies within 30 yds have 1 poison and disease effect removed from them every 3 sec.

abilities.name: Base: Beast Blood
abilities.desc: Infuse your Cauldron with Beast Blood for 10 seconds, causing 15% of the direct Physical damage taken by party and raid members within 40 yds to instead be dealt over time.Only 1 Base can be active at a time.

abilities.name: Strength of Da Loa
abilities.desc: Increases the attack power of party and raid members by 5%.Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, health and mana restoration provided by your Spirits now occurs -50% more often.

abilities.name: Brewmaster
abilities.desc: Reduces the cast time of Loa's Brew by 0.25 sec.

abilities.name: Master Mixologist
abilities.desc: For 10 seconds, the effectiveness of all Cauldron effects and Ingredients is increased by 100% and you can cast Spirit in a Bottle while moving.

abilities.name: Ingredient: Frog Bones
abilities.desc: Brew Frog Bones into your Cauldron.Cauldron: Grants allies within 40 yds -3% reduced damage taken.Potion: Grants target ally an absorption shield, absorbing 50 + 35% Spirit damage, scaling with Spirit.

abilities.name: Healing Ward
abilities.desc: Drop a Healing Ward near you for 1 minute, healing 8 nearby allies within 30 yds for 48 + 20% SP + 12% ranged AP + 10% Spirit every 3 sec.

abilities.name: Mirage
abilities.desc: Become invisible for 20 seconds, gaining 5 Spirits, leaving a copy of yourself behind, and reducing threat each second. Direct damage or healing done will end this effect.While invisible, you can only see other invisible targets and those who can see invisible.

abilities.name: Base: Crystal Water
abilities.desc: Infuse your Cauldron with Crystal Water for 10 seconds, causing party and raid members within 40 yds to be shielded for 20% of their healing taken for 5 seconds.Only 1 Base can be active at a time.

abilities.name: Devotion to Bwonsamdi
abilities.desc: Your direct damage now heals you for 10% of the damage done.

abilities.name: Voice of Bwonsamdi
abilities.desc: Let the spirit of Bwonsamdi possess you for 15 seconds.Dealing periodic damage unleashes a trapped voodoo spirit at enemies, exploding for 162 + 25% shadow SP Shadow damage.

abilities.name: Bad Juju
abilities.desc: Hurl a bolt of dark magic at an enemy, dealing 191 + 87.65% SP Shadow damage, scaling with your Spirit.If the target is affected by Hex of Malice it also reduces the target's healing received by -20% for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Malicious Golems
abilities.desc: Summoning your War Golem now increases your spell haste by 30% for 20 seconds.In addition, periodic damage dealt by Hex of Malice and damage dealt by Shadow Puppets will reduce the cooldown of War Golem by -0.5 sec.

abilities.name: Spirit Shock
abilities.desc: Shock an enemy's spirit, silencing them for 4 seconds and interrupting non-player spellcasting for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Berserking
abilities.desc: Periodic damage dealt now has a 25% chance to increase the haste of your Serpent Wards by 3% for 15 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.

abilities.name: Serpent's Guile
abilities.desc: Your Malefic Arrow now deals an additional 15% of its damage dealt every 1 sec for 4 seconds as Nature damage.

abilities.name: Alchemical Enhancement
abilities.desc: Increases your haste by 5%.

abilities.name: Veil of Darkness
abilities.desc: Envelop a target in a shadowy voodoo veil, increasing the damage you deal to them by 15% for 15 seconds.If you are within 40 yds of the target you deal 195 + 10% shadow SP + 4.5% AP Shadow damage to them every 2 second.

abilities.name: Voodoo Cauldron
abilities.desc: Place down a Voodoo Cauldron for 15 seconds, increasing allies' healing received by 20% while near the cauldron.Allies within 15 yds are healed for 300 + 60% healing every 1.5 sec for 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Puppeteer's Grasp
abilities.desc: Transform into a malignant spirit for 30 seconds, allowing you to cast Malefic Wrath and Bad Juju while moving, and periodically granting you a Spirit every 2 sec.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

abilities.name: Mojo Beam
abilities.desc: Bring mojo to an ally, healing for 174 + 18.5% SP every 1 sec for 4 seconds. While channeling, you can instantly cast Potion Toss, Splash Potion and Spirit in a Bottle at a 20% increased cost.

abilities.name: Mojo Addiction
abilities.desc: Increases your maximum mana by 5%.

abilities.name: Prolonged Malice
abilities.desc: Increases the duration of your Hex of Malice by 6 sec and the range of your offensive Voodoo spells by 6 yds.

abilities.name: Touch of Mueh'zala
abilities.desc: Increases the duration of Stasis Ward's stun effect by 1 sec.

abilities.name: Call of Sseratus
abilities.desc: Summon 4 Serpent Wards near you for 15 seconds.Scales with modifiers to Serpent Ward.

abilities.name: Soul Feeder
abilities.desc: Increases the damage dealt by Malefic Arrow by 5% for each active Spirit on you.

abilities.name: Staff of the Coven
abilities.desc: Increases your Spirit by 8% and your hit chance by 2%.

abilities.name: Death Draught
abilities.desc: Drink a potent voodoo draught that slows your body to a deathlike stillness for up to 5 minutes, causing you to feign death which may trick enemies into ignoring you.

abilities.name: Jungle Secrets
abilities.desc: When you heal with Loa's Brew your Effigies will now heal an additional ally within 20 yds for 35% of the healing done, prioritizing allies with low health.

abilities.name: Shadow Puppets
abilities.desc: Summon a Shadow Puppet that collects a Spirit and rushes towards your target, dealing 25 + 22% shadow SP Shadow damage, repeating every 1 sec for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Zalazane's Malice
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Hex of Malice by 15% and the duration of Jinxes by 2 sec.

abilities.name: Overflowing Juju
abilities.desc: Increases the spell power scaling of Malefic Wrath, Shadowflare, and Bad Juju by 20%.

abilities.name: Stranglethorn Style
abilities.desc: Increases your critical strike chance by 4% and reduces threat generated by your Voodoo spells by -20%.

abilities.name: Loa Spirits
abilities.desc: Damage dealt and healing done now has a 8% chance to collect a Spirit.In addition, each active Spirit now increases your Spirit by 2%.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.

abilities.name: De Other Side
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Shadow Puppets now increases your damage and critical strike chance by 1% for 20 seconds, stacking up to 10 times.Additional procs do not refresh the duration.

abilities.name: Hexplosion
abilities.desc: Your offensive critical strikes now increase your haste by 20% for 6 seconds.

abilities.name: Growing Malice
abilities.desc: Each tick of Hex of Malice increases the damage of the next tick on the enemy by 3%, stacking 10 times.

abilities.name: War Golem
abilities.desc: Summon a War Golem for 10 seconds, absorbing damage dealt to you based on your Intellect, and redirecting harmful spells cast on nearby allies to itself.

abilities.name: Voodoo Strings
abilities.desc: When Bad Juju is used on enemies affected by Puppeteer's Threads, it strikes an additional time every 1 sec for 30% of the damage dealt over 3 seconds as Nature damage.

abilities.name: Hollow Spirit / It's Da Voodoo
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Shadowflare and Hexfire now increases the chance enemies are critically struck by 3% for 12 seconds.

abilities.name: Sen'jin's Swiftness / Sen'jin's Wisdom
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Mirage by -60 sec.

abilities.name: Jinx of Decay / Will of the Serpent
abilities.desc: Your Lethargy Jinx now also reduces the target's periodic healing received by -30%.

abilities.name: Gonk's Blessing / Krag'wa's Blessing
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Amphibimorph by -60 sec, but increases its cast time by 0.5 sec.

abilities.name: Dark Mojo / Blessing of Hir'eek
abilities.desc: Increases your chance to resist magic and curse effects by 20%.

abilities.name: Blatant Curse / Latent Curse
abilities.desc: Reduces the mana cost of your Jinxes by -25%.

abilities.name: Spirit Out Of The Bottle / Touch of the Spirits
abilities.desc: Casting Spirit in a Bottle now grants Spirit.SpiritRegenerates 7 health and mana, repeating every 4 sec for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.@ifknown:500950:In addition, channeling Mojo Beam causes Spirit in a Bottle to affect 3 additional allies near the primary target.:ifknown@

abilities.name: Spice: Peacebloom / Spice: Earthroot
abilities.desc: Infuse your Cauldron with Spice: Peacebloom.Reduces the duration of roots, stuns, and snares against allies within 40 yds by -25%.

abilities.name: Rage Brew / Arcane Brew
abilities.desc: Throw your Rage Brew at an ally, regenerating 50% of their maximum Rage, Energy, and Focus. Increases their attack power and ranged attack power by 15% for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Jungle Booms / Doctor of the Jungle
abilities.desc: Jungle Shrooms when used with Potion Toss and Splash Potion now ticks -0.5 sec faster.

abilities.name: Godslayer / The True Spirit
abilities.desc: Your Spirit Glaive now deals an additional 54 + 19% shadow SP + 14% ranged AP Shadow damage to up to 5 nearby enemies at the end of its duration.

abilities.name: Hex of Death / Spirit Hunting
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Malefic Arrow now reduces the targets healing received by -20% for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.

abilities.name: Spirit Striker / Hexfire Mass
abilities.desc: Increases the proc chance of Voodoo Fire by 10%.

abilities.name: Bwonsamdi's Edge / Dambala's Lethality
abilities.desc: Your Spirit Eclipse now deals 40% increased damage when it explodes on impact.

abilities.name: Viper Ward / Serpent Handler
abilities.desc: Transforms Call of Sseratus into Viper Ward.Viper WardSummons a powerful and fast-attacking Viper Ward at target location for 20 seconds.Viper Wards have a 50% chance to unleash a Hexfire Blast, dealing 216 + 15% ranged AP Fire damage to an enemy.Chance increased based on your ranged critical strike rating.
